title: "F5 XC"
nav_title: "F5 XC"

<!-- Code generated by gen-dns-providers; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Configuration for the [F5 XC](https://www.f5.com/products/distributed-cloud-services) DNS provider.

See the [lego documentation](https://go-acme.github.io/lego/dns/f5xc/) for full details.

```yaml
letsEncrypt:
  dnsProvider: "f5xc"
  dnsCredentials:
    # F5XC_API_TOKEN: API token
    apiToken: ""
    # F5XC_GROUP_NAME: Group name
    groupName: ""
    # F5XC_TENANT_NAME: XC Tenant shortname
    tenantName: ""
    # F5XC_HTTP_TIMEOUT: API request timeout in seconds (Default: 30)
    httpTimeout: ""
    # F5XC_POLLING_INTERVAL: Time between DNS propagation check in seconds (Default: 2)
    pollingInterval: ""
    # F5XC_PROPAGATION_TIMEOUT: Maximum waiting time for DNS propagation in seconds (Default: 60)
    propagationTimeout: ""
    # F5XC_SERVER: Server domain (Default: console.ves.volterra.io)
    server: ""
    # F5XC_TTL: The TTL of the TXT record used for the DNS challenge in seconds (Default: 120)
    ttl: ""
```

You may also use the raw lego environment-variable names as keys instead of the normalized names.
Credentials may also be supplied directly as system environment variables, in which case `dnsCredentials` can be omitted.
